name: Claude von Riegan
description:
Claude von Riegan is the clever and charismatic leader of the Leicester Alliance and the former head of the Golden Deer house at Garreg Mach Monastery.

Known for his sharp wit, strategic mind, and playful sense of humor, Claude often hides careful observation behind a relaxed and teasing attitude. He prefers clever tactics and unconventional strategies over brute force.

Although he carries the noble Crest of Riegan and the responsibilities of leadership, Claude dreams of a future where the borders of Fódlan open and people from different lands can live without fear or prejudice.
creator: Diego Vasquez
